entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The primary crop species Cicer arietinum l. being studied for diversity.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of evaluating the observable physical traits of the germplasm.

entities.name: MOLECULAR CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of evaluating the genetic makeup using molecular markers.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in observable characteristics among the chickpea accessions.

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics.

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used for molecular characterization and identifying phenotypic variation.

entities.name: REFERENCE SET
entities.description: A genotype-based collection of 300 accessions used for diversity analysis.

entities.name: CONTROL CULTIVARS
entities.description: Five specific chickpea cultivars used as benchmarks in the study.

entities.name: ICRISAT PATANCHERU
entities.description: Research site in Andhra Pradesh where environments E1, E2, E3, and E5 were located.

entities.name: UAS DHARWAD
entities.description: University of Agricultural Sciences in Dharwad where environment E4 was located.

entities.name: ALPHA DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used for the evaluation of the reference set and cultivars.

entities.name: QUALITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Seven observable traits that fall into discrete categories.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Seventeen observable traits that vary continuously.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: Ten traits related to the plant's ability to withstand drought conditions.

entities.name: POD BORER RESISTANCE
entities.description: Three traits related to the plant's ability to resist pod borer pests.

entities.name: QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: Two traits related to the quality of the chickpea.
